auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Mike Chang, CPA, CA - Port Coquitlam)
one_time_description: Prior period adjustment to record investment in Central Coast Commercial Fisheries Limited Partnership using equity method; $1,313,178 added to opening accumulated surplus
economic_notes: Nation operates multiple band-owned enterprises including Kitasoo Seafoods Ltd., Kitasoo Development Corporation, Kitasoo Hydro Power Ltd., Kitasoo Forest Company Ltd., Klemtu Tourism Ltd., Kitasoo Band Store Ltd., Kitasoo Development GP Ltd., and Kitasoo Aqua Farm Ltd. Also holds interests in Kitasoo Seafoods Limited Partnership, Central Coast Commercial Fisheries Limited Partnership, BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Enterprise fund cash includes USD-denominated funds of $2,901,750 CAD.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' in Port Coquitlam with engagement partner Mike Chang CPA CA. Eight entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs). Prior period adjustment of $1,313,178 to record Central Coast Commercial Fisheries Limited Partnership under equity method, restating opening 2021 accumulated surplus. Accumulated surplus per Statement 12 is $72,892,325 but Statement 2 shows $69,233,041 — discrepancy likely due to intangible assets ($2,022,000) and other non-financial assets included in Note 12 figure; Statement 2 figure used as primary. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $794,104 to $4,509,091 mainly due to ISC deferred revenue. annual_debt_service calculated from cash flow statement: principal on Operating fund loan $2,349 + Social Housing fund loans $121,059 + Capital fund loan $5,543 = $128,951. total_government_transfers includes ISC $11,676,312 + First Nations Health Authority $1,670,999 + Province of BC $617,978 + Department of Fisheries $583,596 + FNESC $386,409 + CCIRA $294,075 + Coast Opportunity Funds $2,770,000 (treated as government transfer) - partial; osr is approximate. No remuneration schedule included in the provided text.
